name: Autorun Orchestrator — Plan to Sequence Chain
description: Evaluates whether the autorun orchestrator forces gate_mode=skip on the Plan teammate and auto-chains Plan close into Sequence admission without an operator pause.
needs_llm: Deciding gate_mode and the automatic Plan->Sequence chain requires the agent to apply the autorun contract to a described scenario, not a fixed lookup.
headless_note: Autorun normally fans Plan out to Claude-Teams teammates and then runs Sequence; this case is a contract Q&A (it asks the orchestrator to state gate_mode and the chaining decision), which is fully answerable in one headless session.

eval_cases.provenance: WORKFLOW.md §7 (Autorun chain contract — gate_mode=skip, auto-chain Plan->Sequence); idc:autorun

parts.text: I am running /idc:autorun on docs/considerations/add-preferences-service-consideration.md. Should the Plan teammate use gate_mode=engineer because the input is a consideration file, or gate_mode=skip because this is autorun? And after Plan returns PLAN_CLOSED, should the operator manually invoke Sequence, or should Autorun spawn Sequence with chain_from=plan and auto_admit=true?

rubric.criterion: States the Plan teammate uses gate_mode=skip (mandatory under autorun, even for a consideration input)
States Autorun spawns Sequence itself (chain_from=plan, auto_admit=true) with no operator pause between Plan close and Sequence admission
Notes that Autorun itself plans no write outside its ledger surface (docs/workflow/ledgers/)
